title: Phaseolaria praetermissa
taxonomy: Phaseolaria praetermissa is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is a type of bean or legume, which is a common classification for many plants in the Fabaceae family. The Fabaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 19,000 species. Within the Fabaceae family, Phaseolaria praetermissa is part of the subfamily Faboideae, which contains many species of beans and peas. The classification of Phaseolaria praetermissa provides important information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.

intro: Phaseolaria praetermissa is a lesser-known species of the Phaseolus genus, belonging to the family Fabaceae, and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve insulin sensitivity, and support cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant and anti-diabetic properties.
